summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable incomplete — missing artifact-cleanup.test.ts (test file), fixtures/workflow-test-artifacts.json, fixtures/workflow-test-policy.json, and .actrc, all referenced in code but not provided. Cannot run `bun test` or validate workflow without them. Workflow lacks error handling on Bun curl installation (line ~14: no failure check). artifact-cleanup.ts is well-typed and clear. test-harness.ts hardcodes expected string counts ('30 pass') without showing test suite definition. Policy application has overlapping rules (age/keep-latest-N/max-size) that could conflict unpredictably. What exists is structurally sound but untestable in current form.
